prompt: Generate specification.yaml and validate that all IDs follow the correct format: SPEC-XXX-XXX for specification.id, REQ-XXX-XXX for requirements.id, AC-XXX-XXX-XX for acceptance_criteria.id, DD-XXX-XXX for design_decisions.id. The module is a notification system with requirements: 1) Send email notifications, 2) Send push notifications, 3) Track notification status.

assertions.name: req_id_format_correct
assertions.description: All requirements.id must match pattern REQ-[A-Z]+-[0-9]+

assertions.name: ac_id_format_correct
assertions.description: All acceptance_criteria.id must match pattern AC-[A-Z]+-[0-9]+-[0-9]+

assertions.name: dd_id_format_correct
assertions.description: All design_decisions.id must match pattern DD-[A-Z]+-[0-9]+

assertions.name: gherkin_fields_complete
assertions.description: All acceptance_criteria must have given/when/then fields with >= 5 characters
